mapper.sql: r.id, r.employee_id, eu.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, r.reviewer_id, revu.full_name AS reviewer_name, r.review_year, r.review_period, r.ratings, r.total_score, r.comment, r.status, r.submitted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at

FROM erp_performance_reviews r LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users eu ON e.email = eu.email LEFT JOIN erp_employees rev ON r.reviewer_id = rev.id LEFT JOIN users revu ON rev.email = revu.email
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE r.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid ORDER BY r.review_year DESC, r.review_period ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_performance_reviews ( id, employee_id, reviewer_id, review_year, review_period, ratings, total_score, comment, status, submitted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{employeeId}::uuid, #{reviewerId}::uuid, #{reviewYear}, #{reviewPeriod}, #{ratings,typeHandler=com.nak.backend.config.mybatis.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{totalScore}, #{comment}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_performance_reviews SET employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}::uuid, review_year = #{reviewYear}, review_period = #{reviewPeriod}, ratings = #{ratings,typeHandler=com.nak.backend.config.mybatis.JsonbTypeHandler}, total_score = #{totalScore}, comment = #{comment}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE erp_performance_reviews SET status = #{status}, submitted_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'submitted' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
